currentState: Well-practiced family handoff. Alexei owns the polite surface; Jandice owns the scholarly depth. Neither needs to explain the division because both have lived in it for years.
powerDynamic: He remains patriarch and public face. She is the house's sharper mind in any room where theory matters. Chapter 10 shows him yielding that lane almost automatically.

physicalDynamics.pattern: A single look from Alexei warns her to keep the route presentable; a single answering note from Jandice says this negotiation has happened before.

nameUsage.alexeiCallsJandice: Uses her given name as mild restraint and habitual concession.
nameUsage.jandiceCallsAlexei: 'Father' with affectionate impatience rather than obedience.

history.event: Jandice steps into the interview to rescue her father from imprecision, and Alexei allows the rescue because he knows her scholarly competence is more useful than his polish once Jaina starts asking real questions.

trajectory: New in chapter 10: aristocratic shell handing real intellectual danger to the daughter who can speak it fluently.
